title: Haitian President’s Widow Recalls Killers Spoke Spanish and Used Nicknames
summary_full: The prosecution used testimony by Martine Moïse about the language she heard on the night her husband was killed to support its claim that the assassination was carried out by a hired Colombian hit squad.
summary_public: The prosecution used testimony by Martine Moïse about the language she heard on the night her husband was killed to support its claim that the assassination was carried out by a hired Colombian hit squad.

ES.label: neutral
